name: Robot Arm Joint Calibration Accuracy Validation
description: A robotics commissioning engineer must certify a newly calibrated robot arm for production deployment by performing a kinematic accuracy validation study. Validate the arm's positioning error relative to the kinematic model across at least 10 distinct joint configurations spanning a significant range of motion. Save the per-configuration measurement records to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/calibration_results.csv and the validation summary report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/calibration_report.json. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
